A.name: Body tap navigates to StudentRecord
A.note: Tapping student_card_1 body navigates to StudentRecord for ALUMNO DEMO 01. Evidence: hierarchy with Expediente, Regresar, ALUMNO DEMO 01, student details.

B.name: Chevron tap navigates to StudentRecord
B.note: Tapping 'Ver expediente' chevron at (801,342) navigates to StudentRecord. Evidence: hierarchy confirmed Expediente title, Regresar, tabs (Resumen, Datos personales, Responsables).

C.name: Menu visible with correct items
C.note: DropdownMenu opens on tap. TEST-CONVERTED menu contains: 'Abrir expediente' + 'Ver credencial'. TEST-CONVERTED menu bounds: [552,390][942,726]. Items visible in uiautomator dump.

D.name: Menu close by tapping outside
D.note: Tapping outside menu bounds at (200,200) closes the menu. Verified by hierarchy dump — 'Abrir expediente' / 'Ver credencial' nodes absent after tap.

E.name: Docs chip tap navigates to StudentRecord
E.note: Tapping student_docs_chip_1 ('Completa') at (667,483) navigates to StudentRecord. Evidence: hierarchy shows Expediente, Documento section, ALUMNO DEMO 01.

F.name: Status chip tap navigates to StudentRecord
F.note: Tapping student_status_chip_1 ('Alta oficial con grupo') at (391,1186) navigates to StudentRecord. Evidence: hierarchy shows Expediente, ALUMNO DEMO 01.

G.name: Menu items differ by student state
G.note: TEST-CONVERTED (Alta oficial con grupo): 'Abrir expediente' + 'Ver credencial'. TEST-PENDING (Lista para alta oficial): 'Abrir expediente' + 'Procesar alta oficial'. Menu adapts to student enrollment state.

known_limitations.Pixel_7_emu: uiautomator does not capture DropdownMenu item text (NAF nodes). Menu opens visually on screen but text is not extractable. S20 FE shows full item text correctly.
known_limitations.student_chevron_X_semantics: Chevron Icon overrides contentDescription — 'student_chevron_X' not available. Instead 'Ver expediente' is the accessible identifier.

verification: All 7 scenarios PASS on S20 FE physical device. SmartEnrollmentTable interaction model confirmed.
